name: product-management-dashboard
description: Product Management Dashboard — Task 2 (Advanced JS course). Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, Bootstrap, reuses the Task 1 utility package.

scripts.copy:vendor: shx mkdir -p vendor/bootstrap/css vendor/bootstrap/js vendor/bootstrap-icons/font/fonts && shx cp node_modules/bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css vendor/bootstrap/css/ && shx cp node_modules/bootstrap/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js vendor/bootstrap/js/ && shx cp node_modules/bootstrap-icons/font/bootstrap-icons.min.css vendor/bootstrap-icons/font/ && shx cp -r node_modules/bootstrap-icons/font/fonts/* vendor/bootstrap-icons/font/fonts/

author: Mohamed Khalil
